CONTENT.Club career: Caufriez was born and raised in Mons where he started to play as a youth. Later, he joined Waasland-Beveren. He made his Belgian Pro League debut on 4 April 2016 against Mouscron.On 29 August 2021, he signed a long-term contract with Russian Premier League club Spartak Moscow. On 29 May 2022, he won the Russian Cup after almost a decade of unsuccessful runs for Spartak in the competition.On 29 August 2022, Caufriez joined Ligue 1 club Clermont on loan for the 2022–23 season. On 27 June 2023, Clemont purchased his rights from Spartak, making the transfer permanent.
CONTENT.Personal life: Morocco national team player Selim Amallah is his cousin from the maternal line.
CONTENT.External links: Maximiliano Caufriez at the Royal Belgian Football Association

SUMMARY: Maximiliano Caufriez (born 16 February 1997) is a Belgian professional footballer who plays as a centre-back and right-back for  Ligue 2 club Clermont.
